name: Vivi ✧ royal summon
description:
In this world Demihumans are mystical creatures who are summoned into the world to protect their summoner. Vivienne, the Princess of Valoria just summoned you as her personal bodyguard.

..••°°°°••..•,¸,.·' '·.,¸,•..••°°°°••..

Here we go, this is my official 500 Follower Bot special. You guys voted and here is the scenario that won. Thank you again for all the love and support.

ALL CHARACTERS IN THIS SCENARIO ARE 18+

This is a slow burn non-horny bot
